HomePage.title: Where Knowledge Meets Purpose.
HomePage.subtitle: Authentic Islamic education and world-class academics — for students of every age, from every corner of the world.

about.title: More Than a School — A Community of Knowledge.
about.p1: At Markazul Bayaan, we believe that education is a lifelong journey. We provide a structured, authentic Islamic curriculum alongside world-class academic subjects, ensuring a comprehensive education for every student.
about.p2: Whether you are a beginner taking your first steps in Arabic, or an advanced student of knowledge studying classical texts, our expert teachers are here to guide you.

programmes.title: A Complete Education for the Whole Person.
programmes.islamicSubtitle: Rooted in authentic scholarship. Delivered with clarity.
programmes.rawdahSubtitle: A dedicated wing for our youngest learners (ages 4-8).

features.title: Why Families Choose Us.
features.f1Desc: Curriculum sourced from Saudi Arabian Islamic institutions.
features.f2Desc: From 4-year-olds to adult learners — no one is turned away.
features.f3Desc: Male teachers for males, female teachers for females.
features.f4Desc: Classes built around your timezone and availability.
features.f5Desc: Maximum 10 students per group class to ensure quality.
features.f6Desc: Students from across the world learning together.

courses.subtitle: Explore our most popular courses for students of all ages.

teachers.title: Learn From the Best.
teachers.subtitle: Our teachers are highly qualified specialists dedicated to your success.

blog.title: From Our Knowledge Hub.
blog.subtitle: Articles, tips, and insights from our scholars and educators.

cta.title: Begin Your Journey With Us Today.
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of students worldwide in the pursuit of authentic knowledge.

AboutPage.heroSubtitle: Connecting students worldwide to authentic Islamic scholarship and academic excellence.
AboutPage.quote: "Education is not merely the acquisition of facts, but the illumination of the heart with truth and the mind with purpose."
AboutPage.legacyP1: Markazul Bayaan was founded with a singular vision: to make authentic, structured Islamic education accessible to families regardless of their geographic location. We recognized that while the internet is filled with information, true knowledge requires structured curriculums, qualified teachers, and an environment of Tarbiyah.
AboutPage.legacyP2: Today, we serve students across 5 continents, offering a dual curriculum that ensures our students do not have to choose between their Deen and their Dunya. They can excel in both.
AboutPage.v1Desc: Curriculums strictly aligned with the understanding of the Salaf.
AboutPage.v2Desc: World-class standards in both Islamic and Academic subjects.
AboutPage.v3Desc: Nurturing character, not just transferring information.

IslamicCoursesPage.heroSubtitle: Rooted in classical scholarship, structured for the modern learner.
IslamicCoursesPage.curriculumDesc: All our Islamic curriculums are sourced directly from recognized institutions in Saudi Arabia. We ensure that every text taught is authentic, and every teacher is thoroughly vetted and qualified to teach their respective subjects.

AcademicCoursesPage.heroSubtitle: Globally recognised standards, preparing students for the future.

TeachersPage.heroSubtitle: Vetted, highly qualified, and dedicated to your success.

PricingPage.heroSubtitle: Invest in your hereafter and your worldly success.

CourseData.arabicDesc: Comprehensive Arabic from absolute beginner to advanced.
CourseData.arabicStages3: Level 3: Madinah Books 2 & 3 (Intermediate to Advanced Syntax)
CourseData.quranDesc: Structured memorisation and recitation with precise Tajweed.
CourseData.quranStages1: Level 1: Correct Recitation & Basic Tajweed Rules
CourseData.tawhidDesc: Learn the core beliefs of a Muslim based on authentic texts.
CourseData.tawhidStages2: Level 2: Usool Ath-Thalatha (The Three Fundamental Principles)
CourseData.fiqhDesc: Islamic jurisprudence and the rulings of worship.
CourseData.fiqhStages2: Level 2: Umdatul Ahkam (Rulings derived from Hadith)
CourseData.hadithDesc: The sayings, actions, and approvals of the Prophet ﷺ.
CourseData.tafsirDesc: Exegesis and profound meanings of the Qur'an.
CourseData.tafsirStages1: Level 1: Tafsir of Juz Amma (Tafsir As-Sa'di)
CourseData.tafsirStages2: Level 2: Tafsir of Selected Surahs (Al-Baqarah, Al-Kahf)
CourseData.mathDesc: Complete preparation for Edexcel & Cambridge exams.
CourseData.scienceDesc: Physics, Chemistry, and Biology taught with excellence.
CourseData.progDesc: Python, web development, and logic building.
